_comment: Filter config for the roles lens. Maintained by Glyphie 🌀. The roles lens exists to give Aadi a chance to SEE relevant open policy roles — exposure first, delta (team-growth signal) second. Keep keywords tight so we surface policy/governance roles, not the ML-engineer firehose.
_notes: titleInclude is matched case-insensitively against the role title. titleExclude is applied AFTER include (a 'Policy Engineer' would still pass include but we'd rather keep it — excludes only fire when NO include keyword is the primary signal; see fetch-roles.mjs logic). geoPrefer is used to RANK/flag London-relevant roles, not to hard-drop others — Aadi may care about a Brussels EMEA policy role too. Blog keyword filtering reuses titleInclude as a relevance hint.
